caption: The video appears to be a live online training session for the Amherst Affordable Housing Trust Fund, scheduled for January 11, 2024. The presenter, Shelly Goehring, who is identified as the Senior Program Manager, is using Microsoft PowerPoint to deliver the presentation. The slide currently displayed features an image of hands holding a cardboard house model, symbolizing affordable housing. The Windows desktop background and various application icons suggest that the session is being conducted on a computer running the Windows operating system. The top right corner shows a small video feed of the presenter, indicating that this is likely a virtual meeting or webinar. The slides in the sidebar preview additional content related to the training, including topics such as today's agenda and what a housing trust fund is. The overall setting indicates a professional and informative environment aimed at educating participants about affordable housing initiatives.
